text: Place your hands down to the floor.
Lower your knees down to the floor.
Lower all the way down onto your belly with control.
Lower down gently onto your elbows.
Lower down and come into a seated position.
Press back up to hands and knees, into tabletop.
Press into your hands and come up to seated.
Press up to hands and knees, into tabletop.
Return to tabletop, onto hands and knees.
Slowly rise up to standing.
Soften your knees and roll down slowly, one vertebra at a time.
Roll onto your back with control.
Roll up and come back to seated.
Roll onto your side with control.
Shift your weight back slightly.
Shift your weight forward slightly.
Step one foot back into a lunge.
Step one foot back, then the other, into plank.
Step your feet together.
Step your feet wider apart.
Step one foot forward between your hands into a lunge.
Step your feet forward to meet your hands, into a forward fold.
Place your hands down, then step or swing your legs back.
Swing or step your legs forward and come back to seated.
Walk your hands back toward your feet.
Walk your hands forward.
